title: The complete Assetto Corsa graphics guide

messages.content: ## Want to get a good looking game? Heres how:

# Step 1:
> Download **CSP (Custom Shaders Patch)**. You can use the free version, but if you want rain you'll need the paid version.
> <#1322225183297376266> 
> <#1322228581186801745> 

# Step 2: 
> Configure your CSP settings.
> You can find presets below in share settings.
> <#1189409395226984518> 
> ⚠️ **Never pay for CSP settings! Most sellers have no real expertise and are just reselling basic tweaks that you can find for free or easily adjust yourself.**

# Step 3:
> Download SOL (free) or PURE ($1) (You shouldn't have both installed simultaneously!)
> <#1322233156790653010> (Incompatible with CSP version 0.2.10+)
> <#1322227974371545159> 

# Step 4:
> Find a PP-Filter that supports either SOL or PURE. (Free or paid)  
> ⚠️ **Be cautious with some paid filters, as they may be stolen, lack scripts, or simply be the default Pure filter.**
> 
> All PP-Filters must be installed manually!
> https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1358606555574173786
> 
> Two lists of suggested PP-Filters, one for SOL and one for PURE are linked below.
> https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1358607528845508708
> https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1358606823388872775
